name: Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and sauté until softened, without browning.
3. Add the rice (without washing) and stir to coat completely.
4. Pour in the boiling liquid (water).
5. Return to a boil.
6. Season with salt to taste.
7. Cover tightly and bake at 350°F for 15-18 minutes, until liquid is absorbed and rice is dry and fluffy.
8. Taste the rice and bake an additional 3-5 minutes if needed.
9. Turn off heat and turn out into a hotel pan.
10. Fluff with a fork and keep warm for service.
11. Stir in additional raw butter as desired.
12. Serve hot.
